scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
    TRIM(CAST(despacho_id AS NVARCHAR))         AS despacho_id,
    TRIM(CAST(recepcion_id AS NVARCHAR))        AS recepcion_id,
    TRIM(nro_lote)                              AS nro_lote,
    TRIM(CAST(almacen_id AS NVARCHAR))          AS almacen_id,
    TRIM(CAST(transportista_id AS NVARCHAR))    AS transportista_id,
    TRIM(CAST(vehiculo_id AS NVARCHAR))         AS vehiculo_id,
    TRIM(fecha_despacho)                        AS fecha_despacho,
    TRIM(CAST(cantidad_despachada AS NVARCHAR)) AS cantidad_despachada,
    TRIM(centro_destino)                        AS centro_destino,
    TRIM(estado)                                AS estado,
    TRIM(responsable)                           AS responsable,
    TRIM(nro_guia_despacho)                     AS nro_guia_despacho,
    TRIM(fecha_llegada)                         AS fecha_llegada
FROM bronze.agenciasedem_despachos',

derivedColumn1 derive(nro_lote = iif(isNull(nro_lote) || trim(replace(nro_lote, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(nro_lote, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', 'Sin Lote', upper(trim(replace(nro_lote, '"', '')))),

fecha_despacho = iif(isNull(fecha_despacho) || trim(replace(fecha_despacho, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(fecha_despacho, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toDate('1900-01-01'), coalesce(toDate(trim(replace(fecha_despacho, '"', '')), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_despacho, '"', '')), 'dd/MM/yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_despacho, '"', '')), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_despacho, '"', '')), 'dd-MM-yyyy'), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_despacho, '"', '')), 'yyyyMMdd'))),

fecha_llegada = ERROR_FUNCTION('iif(isNull(fecha_llegada) || trim(replace(fecha_llegada, __SINGLE_QUOTE__"__SINGLE_QUOTE__, __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__)) == __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__ || upper(trim(replace(fecha_llegada, __SINGLE_QUOTE__"__SINGLE_QUOTE__, __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__))) == __SINGLE_QUOTE__NULL__SINGLE_QUOTE__, toDate(__SINGLE_QUOTE__1900-01-01__SINGLE_QUOTE__), coalesce(toDate(trim(replace(fecha_llegada, __SINGLE_QUOTE__"__SINGLE_QUOTE__, __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__)), __SINGLE_QUOTE__yyyy-MM-dd__SINGLE_QUOTE__), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_llegada, __SINGLE_QUOTE__"__SINGLE_QUOTE__, __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__)), __SINGLE_QUOTE__dd/MM/yyyy__SINGLE_QUOTE__), toDate(trim(fecha_llegada, __SINGLE_QUOTE__"__SINGLE_QUOTE__, __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__)), __SINGLE_QUOTE__MM/dd/yyyy__SINGLE_QUOTE__), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_llegada, __SINGLE_QUOTE__"__SINGLE_QUOTE__, __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__)), __SINGLE_QUOTE__dd-MM-yyyy__SINGLE_QUOTE__), toDate(trim(replace(fecha_llegada, __SINGLE_QUOTE__"__SINGLE_QUOTE__, __SINGLE_QUOTE____SINGLE_QUOTE__)), __SINGLE_QUOTE__yyyyMMdd__SINGLE_QUOTE__)))')) ~> derivedColumn2
derivedColumn2 derive(centro_destino = iif(isNull(centro_destino) || trim(replace(centro_destino, '"', '')) == '', toString(null()), initCap(trim(replace(centro_destino, '"', '')))),

nro_guia_despacho = iif(isNull(nro_guia_despacho) || trim(replace(nro_guia_despacho, '"', '')) == '' || upper(trim(replace(nro_guia_despacho, '"', ''))) == 'NULL', toString(null()), trim(replace(nro_guia_despacho, '"', ''))),

estado = case(     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'DESPACHADO' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'D', 'DESPACHADO',     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'DEVUELTO' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'R', 'DEVUELTO',     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'EN TRANSITO' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'EN_TRANSITO' || upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) == 'T', 'EN_TRANSITO',     isNull(estado) || trim(replace(estado, '"', '')) == '', toString(null()),     upper(trim(replace(estado, '"', ''))) )) ~> derivedColumn3
